mapper.insert: insert into cook_verification_codes (phone, scene, code, expires_at, error_count) values (#{phone}, #{scene}, #{code}, #{expiresAt}, #{errorCount})
mapper.select: select id, phone, scene, code, expires_at, used_at, error_count, created_at, updated_at from cook_verification_codes where phone = #{phone} and scene = #{scene} and used_at is null and expires_at > current_timestamp order by created_at desc limit 1
mapper.update: update cook_verification_codes set used_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update cook_verification_codes set error_count = error_count + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
